response.overview: A young dancer, once a star, struggles internally after joining a new ballet company where her teacher hardly notices her. Desperate to rise again, she immerses herself in online tutorials from a profound ballerina-turned-influencer, and slowly reshapes herself and her technique in the influencer's image. As her ability strengthens, her obsession deepens. She auditions for the influencer's prestigious company and leaves feeling triumphant, only to overhear a conversation that shatters the idealized version of her idol and her newfound sense of self.
response.title: Pas de Deux
